title: SQL Injection
description: SQL queries constructed by concatenating user-controlled input are vulnerable to SQL injection (OWASP A03:2021). An attacker can manipulate queries to bypass authentication, exfiltrate data, or destroy database contents.

finding.message: Potential SQL injection via string construction at '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Use parameterized queries or prepared statements exclusively; never concatenate user input into SQL strings.
Use an ORM with parameterized query support (SQLAlchemy, Django ORM, Hibernate).
Validate and whitelist all user input before use; apply least-privilege database accounts.
OWASP SQL Injection Prevention Cheat Sheet: https://cheatsheetseries.owasp.org/cheatsheets/SQL_Injection_Prevention_Cheat_Sheet.html
